svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(45, 55, 72), rgb(183, 191, 206)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 778px; height: 1px; padding-top: 34px; margin-left: 26px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: シャクティマット（Shaktimat）包括的レビュー：効能・価格・市場比較

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 250, 252), rgb(20, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(160, 174, 192), rgb(79, 91, 107));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 788px; height: 1px; padding-top: 109px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 1. 製品ポジショニングと市場比較

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 244, 255), rgb(21, 29, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(49, 130, 206), rgb(75, 145, 210));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 194px; margin-left: 36px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
本家：シャクティマット
価格：約23,000円
・倫理的製造（フェアトレード）
・強度設計（スパイク数制御）
・高耐久素材（ABS樹脂・オーガニック）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 215, 215), rgb(71, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(229, 62, 62), rgb(255, 123, 123));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 194px; margin-left: 466px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
安価な類似品
価格：2,000〜4,000円
・刺激強度が不均一（設計思想なし）
・合成素材（劣化・臭気リスク）
・製造プロセスや倫理性が不透明

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(160, 174, 192), rgb(79, 91, 107)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(160, 174, 192), rgb(79, 91, 107));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 194px; margin-left: 414px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 250, 252), rgb(20, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(160, 174, 192), rgb(79, 91, 107));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 788px; height: 1px; padding-top: 299px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 2. メカニズムと科学的エビデンス

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 250, 252), rgb(20, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(160, 174, 192), rgb(79, 91, 107));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 384px; margin-left: 25px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
作用機序：広域体表刺激
（鍼治療とは別物）
・Aβ線維（触圧覚）を刺激
・ゲートコントロール理論の応用

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 255, 244), rgb(12, 25, 16)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(56, 161, 105), rgb(54, 144, 96));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 384px; margin-left: 295px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
検証された効果（主観）
・リラクゼーション感
・短期的ストレス軽減
・主観的な幸福感向上

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 240), rgb(20, 20, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 158, 46), rgb(143, 95, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 384px; margin-left: 565px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
科学的限界・注意点
・生理的指標（血圧等）の有意差なし
・プラセボ効果の可能性
・医学的治療効果は未証明

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(56, 161, 105), rgb(54, 144, 96)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(56, 161, 105), rgb(54, 144, 96));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 384px; margin-left: 269px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 444px; margin-left: 439px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 250, 252), rgb(20, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(160, 174, 192), rgb(79, 91, 107));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 788px; height: 1px; padding-top: 499px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(45, 55, 72), rgb(183, 191, 206)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(45, 55, 72), rgb(183, 191, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 758px; height: 1px; padding-top: 574px; margin-left: 25px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
総合評価：条件付き推奨
「医学的治療」ではなく「高品質なリラクゼーションツール」として評価する場合、
安価品よりもShaktimatの倫理性・耐久性・安全性への投資は合理的である。
